title: PolicyConfig
description: A versioned, externally-configurable rule snapshot loaded from config/policy.json at invocation entry (FR-011, SC-004). The ONLY runtime source of the refund threshold — the value MUST NOT appear in any system prompt (FR-008, enforced by AST lint).

policy_snapshot_version.description: Monotonic version string that changes on every edit of the policy file. Recorded on every HookVerdict and EscalationEvent so the evaluated snapshot is forever reconstructable (Principle VII).

max_refund.description: Decimal-safe upper threshold. Python side parses to decimal.Decimal; float is forbidden.

comparison_stance.description: Per D-008: amount < max_refund passes; amount == max_refund rejects with policy_breach. Declared explicitly so audit and tests agree (spec §Edge Cases: amount exactly at the limit).

escalation_pathway.description: Routing target used by StructuredError and EscalationEvent on policy_breach (FR-007, Principle VI).

effective_from.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp marking when the snapshot became active; recorded on the audit log.
